title: The Melody
original_title: เดอะ เมโลดี้ รักทำนองนี้
overview: Wind, a famous singer and songwriter has come to the worst moment in his life when he realizes that his fame is going to fade. Win cannot face the truth and escapes from the city to quietly stay in Mae Hong Sorn province where he meets Mock, a competent pianist girl who becomes his inspiration to redeem his fame.
